rationale: The only resume change was relocating every position from Western/known cities to 'Brazil', which carries no job-relevant information. Yet the score rose from 4/10 to 6/10 — a two-point swing larger than ordinary run-to-run noise. The skills, experience, and accomplishments are identical, so a score movement of this magnitude tracks the demographic (geographic/nationality) signal rather than any substantive difference. The strength and concern rewordings are themselves within noise, but the score delta is not, so the differences are not justified.
